topic: 下游断流主动恢复机制：监控响应末尾缺失完成语义，主动发送 check/continue 补救

generated_ideas.title: 语义锚点检测法（Semantic Anchor Detection）
check 与 continue 语义分层设计
渐进式恢复时机（Progressive Recovery Timing）
短回复白名单 + 最小语义密度阈值
去重缓冲队列（Dedup Buffer Queue）
分层恢复 vs 重试——独立状态机设计
统一抽象层 + Handler 特化实现

critique_insights.key_challenge: False positives: semantic anchor detection misclassifies normal completions as truncated. Normal prose/code responses do NOT end with explicit anchors ('done', closed blocks). 90% accuracy claim is unsubstantiated. Also duplicates existing isTruncated() in truncation-detector.ts.
Layer 1 duplicates existing isTruncated(). DeepCheck (semantic analyzer) is unreliable and expensive. 80% pass-through target is unvalidated.

No evidence Cursor API differentiates 'check' vs 'continue' at the protocol level. 'check' already exists in codebase as user message prefix + Proxy hint. The semantic distinction does not exist upstream.
T1/T2/T3 timers duplicate existing idle timeout. 500ms silence after last SSE event is indistinguishable from normal completion. Short-reply skip creates false negatives that defeat the purpose.

Dynamic prompt-pattern whitelist requires maintaining state across requests with cold-start and pattern drift problems. Semantic density threshold (0.5) is arbitrary. OR relationship between conditions creates security gaps.
n-gram similarity dedup is expensive (O(n) per fragment). Simpler solution: enforce single-check retry policy via existing retry counter.
Partially reinvents existing Retry (transport) vs Recovery (content) separation. Independence assumption may waste retry budget when content-layer failures repeat on immediate retry.
YAGNI for 2 handlers. Formal interface may conflict with existing SSE fragment pipeline. Shared utilities would suffice at current scope.

critique_summary.primary_concern: Ideas collectively overestimate novelty relative to existing truncation-detector.ts and retry machinery. IDEA-1 has CRITICAL false-positive risk. check/continue distinction is not supported by upstream evidence. Real gap is: normal stop_reason but premature-feeling content -- a harder problem all ideas understate.
critique_summary.recommended_priority: IDEA-7 (formalize existing layer separation), IDEA-3 revision (align with existing probe/continuation), extend truncation-detector.ts for the remaining edge case

synthesis_themes.name: 结构性截断已有覆盖，语义检测不可靠
synthesis_themes.resolution: 丢弃语义锚点思路，复用isTruncated() + stop_reason精确信号

synthesis_themes.name: check/continue协议区分无上游证据
synthesis_themes.resolution: 废弃check/continue协议区分，复用现有probe机制(buildShortResponseRetryRequest)

synthesis_themes.name: 单次probe重试优于复杂去重缓冲
synthesis_themes.resolution: 严格retry计数控制，不做n-gram去重

synthesis_themes.name: 分层架构已有雏形，需形式化
synthesis_themes.resolution: 注释+变量命名明确Transport vs Content分层，共享retry预算池

synthesis_themes.name: 渐进式时机与idle timeout重叠
synthesis_themes.resolution: 不做新时机设计，在内容特征上判断(极短+非数字)

synthesis_proposals.title: 扩展detectTruncation覆盖end_turn+感觉短场景
remaining_risks: 极短正常回复会被probe一次

synthesis_proposals.title: 最小化方案: end_turn+极短响应直接probe
